mapper.select:
SELECT C.SORTKEY , B.HAKGWA , B.DAEHAK , A.HAKYEON , A.TOTJUMSU , A.HAKBUN , B.IRUM , A.DORMGBN , A.SEX , A.IPGBN , C.HAKGWAFNM , A.STATE , A.DONG , A.SIL , A.SIL2 , A.SEQ , DECODE((SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM EAGLE.DORMROOM WHERE HAKBUN = A.HAKBUN AND USINGYN = 'Y'), '0', '미배정' , '배정') AS CHK FROM EAGLE.DOMASTER A , EAGLE.SHJHAKJM B , EAGLE.SGCHAKCM C WHERE 1=1 AND A.HAKBUN = B.HAKBUN AND B.HAKGWA = C.HAKGWA AND A.YEONDO = #{yeondo} AND A.HAKGI = #{hakgi}
AND A.STATE Between '1' And '2' AND A.SEX = '1'
AND A.STATE Between '3' And '4' AND A.SEX = '2'
AND A.STATE Between '5' And '6' AND A.SEX = '1'
ORDER BY C.SORTKEY , B.HAKGWA , A.HAKYEON , A.TOTJUMSU DESC
